text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the academy early one morning, still
yawning to myself when I catch sight of Daiwa
Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer. I'm the first one at school again!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A model student is always early to bed and early
to rise. I got my beauty sleep last night, and now
my skin is flawless!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, someone can't stop yawning. Did you stay up too late?
choice_data_list: I was working on our training program...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then it's an early night for you tonight, you hear?
I can't have you collapsing on me!
